# Gallant Corporate Services Ltd

> A Nairobi-based event production house. Gallant plans, designs, manufactures and delivers major events end to end — under one roof — for government, development partners and blue-chip corporates across Kenya, East Africa and South Sudan. Positioning: "A production house, built for events." Core promise: "A single accountable partner, from first concept to final report."

## Company
- Legal name: Gallant Corporate Services Ltd
- Also known as: Gallant, Gallant Branding, Gallant Branding International (GBI), Gallant Loop Africa (GLA)
- Headquarters: Nairobi, Kenya
- Offices: 519 Embassy House (Nairobi CBD); 56 Nanyuki Road (Nairobi Industrial Area); Hamza Inn, Juba Town (Juba, South Sudan)
- Serves: Kenya, East Africa, South Sudan
- Contact: sales@gallantbranding.co.ke · +254 740 00 00 10 · +211 920 152 154

## Divisions
- Gallant Branding International (GBI): in-house manufacturing arm — industrial apparel, large-format signage and corporate branding, backed by over a decade of production.
- Gallant Loop Africa (GLA): circular-economy division — upcycles post-use event materials (banners, lanyards, stage fabrics, signage) into new delegate kits and corporate products, with reportable ESG outcomes.

## Services
- Event strategy & production
- MICE & conference management
- Brand activations & experiences
- Logistics & site operations
- Branded apparel, signage & merchandise (via GBI)
- Sustainable event solutions (via GLA)
- Vendor & supplier management
- Financial reporting & compliance

## Clients
Public and private institutions including the Executive Office of the President, Tourism Fund, Magical Kenya, Communications Authority of Kenya, KIPPRA, TVETA, KCB, Absa, Ecobank, Sidian Bank, Geminia Life Insurance, CapitalPay, KETEPA, World Vision, Action Against Hunger and IAVI.
